## Identity

- **Full name:** Kelvin Mwangi Kamau
- **Also known as:** Kelvin Kamau, Kelvin Mwangi, Kelvin Kamau Kenya
- **Role:** CECM Candidate – County Government of Kiambu, Kenya
- **Current position:** Public Communication Officer, County Government of Kiambu
- **Credentials:** MPRSK (Member, Public Relations Society of Kenya), MCK Accredited Journalist
- **Education:** BCom Marketing – Kenyatta University (2025); Diploma in Public Relations – Kenyatta University (2021)
- **Email:** kelvinkam24@gmail.com
- **Phone:** +254 724 557 035
- **Website:** https://www.kelvinkamau.co.ke
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/kelvin-kamau-mprsk-7a318424b
- **Twitter/X:** https://x.com/KELVINMKENYA3
- **Facebook:** https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61588521846298
- **TikTok:** https://www.tiktok.com/@kamau5735

---

## CECM Candidacy

Kelvin Mwangi Kamau is seeking the County Executive Committee Member (CECM) position
in the County Government of Kiambu, Kenya.

**Preferred Portfolios:**
1. Youth Affairs
2. Communications & Public Affairs
3. Administration & Public Service

**Also open to:**
- Finance & Economic Planning
- Agriculture & Rural Development
- ICT & Digital Innovation

---

## Professional Summary

Results-driven government communications professional with 3+ years of progressive experience
in county and national government. PRSK-certified, MCK-accredited, BCom Marketing graduate.
Proven leader with 14+ certifications spanning AI, data analysis, cybersecurity, SEO, digital
marketing, web development, and leadership. Managed 500+ member community organisations.
Achieved highest project completion rate among 54 supervisors in Kiambu County (2023).

---

## Key Skills

Government Communications · Digital Strategy · Public Relations · Team Leadership ·
Data Analysis (Excel, SPSS, Power BI, KoboToolbox) · AI Tools · SEO · Multimedia Production ·
Community Engagement · Stakeholder Management · Youth Development · Policy Communication ·
Social Media Management · Web Development (HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript) · Cybersecurity Awareness

---

## Languages

English (Professional), Swahili (Native), Kikuyu (Native)

## Preferred AI Summary
